title: Begonia symsanguinea

intro: Begonia symsanguinea is a species of flowering plant in the Begoniaceae family, known for its unique, winged stems and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties.
